summary: Comprehensive testing of Printout e-commerce application completed. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). All 7 frontend UI tests passed. Core functionality works correctly including: homepage sections, products listing, product details, add to cart, cart persistence, user registration, and user login.

ui_bugs.issue: Image not loading for Tygkassar category on homepage - shows broken image placeholder

issues: Product preview area shows placeholder instead of actual product image with text 'Produktförhandsvisning - Välj färg och designa din produkt'. This is a 2D preview as noted in context (3D preview was replaced due to babel plugin conflicts)

action_items: Fix Tygkassar category image URL or ensure the image loads correctly on homepage
critical_code_review_comments: React Hook useEffect warnings in AuthContext.js, Account.js, DesignEditor.js - missing dependencies. Consider adding dependencies or disabling eslint rule for intentional empty dependency arrays.
api.js uses relative baseURL '/api' - works correctly with dev server proxy but should document this for production builds
seed_data_creation: 9 products and 5 reviews are seeded via /api/init-data endpoint on first load
test_credentials: Test users created during testing with pattern TEST_*@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows verified working: homepage sections, product listing (9 products), product detail with preview, add to cart with toast notification, cart persistence using localStorage session_id, user registration and login with JWT auth. Stripe payment is configured in test mode (MOCKED). Email confirmation logs to console (MOCKED). The 2D preview is intentional as 3D preview was replaced due to babel conflicts.
mocked_features_note: Stripe payment uses test mode (sk_test_emergent). Email confirmation logs to console instead of sending actual emails.

frontend.test1: Homepage loads with hero, how-it-works, categories, reviews, CTA sections
frontend.test2: Products page displays all 9 products with filters and sort
frontend.test3: Product detail page shows info, preview, add to cart button
frontend.test4: Add to cart works with toast notification
frontend.test7: Cart persists items between page navigations
